economic_notes: Consolidated entities include La'Lum'utul Housing Society and Snuneymuxw Youth and Family Society. GBEs/GBPs include Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. (100%), Salpac Fisheries Limited Partnership (49.90%), Petroglyph Development Group Ltd. (100%), and Petroglyph Development Group Limited Partnership (99%). PDG LP is a significant real estate/development enterprise. Mt. Benson Forestry Limited Partnership and subsidiaries of PDG LP also mentioned.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unaudited and unavailable financial information for Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. and Salpac Fisheries Limited Partnership. Chief and Council chose not to disclose condensed supplementary financial information for GBEs/GBPs citing competitive concerns. Prior period restatement applied to 2022 figures due to adjustment in Thlap'qwum Community Settlement Trust income allocation. Housing expenses includes Housing ($1,426,093) and Transitional Housing ($85,575). Expenses by department include Capital Projects ($1,774,609) not mapped to standard categories. The expenses total in statement of operations of $25,650,235 includes a negative line for construction/capital acquisition of -$3,610,497 as per Note 23 object schedule, making functional expenses $25,650,235 at program level. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers (ISC, CMHC, FNHA, BC Gaming, BC Housing, BC Treaty Commission, City of Nanaimo, CSETS, FNESC, DFO, Province of BC, United Way, Ottawa Trust Fund).
